title: Task
description: Tracks the status of an asynchronous job such as report generation. When a report completes, the metadata field contains a temporary download link (expires after 15 minutes by default).

uuid.description: A unique identifier for this task.

status.description: The current status of the task.

metadata.description: A JSON object containing metadata about the task. For completed report tasks this includes a 'link' property with a temporary download URL.

link.description: A temporary download link for the completed report. Expires after 15 minutes by default.
